title: reversible_covalent_v1 — REVERSIBLE-COVALENT sub-axis output rows
description: Output schema for _python_bridge/module/reversible_covalent_sim.py. One row per warhead class: the covalent EQUILIBRIUM (kon/koff, K_eq=kon/koff, residence time tau_res=1/koff) and the reversible/irreversible classification, anchored to the Eyring transition-state-theory rate ceiling. REVERSIBLE-COVALENT is a SUB-AXIS :> COVALENT (expansion-main, AXIS/HIERARCHY.tape) — NOT a hexa-bio core-5 axis. In-silico simulator-consistency only (AGENTS.tape g8/f2).

warhead.description: Warhead identifier within the deterministic panel.

drug_precedent.description: Own drug precedent for the modality (g3/f1 — described by precedent, never lattice-derived).

temperature_K.description: Temperature used for the Eyring rates (K).

dg_rxn_kcal_per_mol.description: Reaction free energy of the covalent step (adduct - encounter complex), exothermic so <= 0.

K_eq.description: Covalent equilibrium constant K_eq = kon / koff.

K_eq_consistency_rel_err.description: Relative error between K_eq (from rates) and K_eq_from_thermo; numerical-consistency gate.

residence_time_s.description: Target-residence time of the covalent adduct, tau_res = 1 / koff (s).

eyring_prefactor_ceiling_per_s.description: Eyring TST universal frequency prefactor kB*T/h — the hard real-limit ceiling on every modelled rate.

koff_reversible_threshold_per_s.description: Classification threshold: koff >= this -> reversible; below -> irreversible.

reversibility.description: Reversibility classification by the koff threshold.
